title: lymanbensonia micrantha
intro: Lymanbensonia micrantha is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lymanbensonia micrantha include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Lymanbensonia micrantha include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
